title: Welcome to WikiNest
excerpt: WikiNest is a lightweight wiki that lives entirely in your GitHub repository. No server, no build step, no dependencies beyond GitHub itself

title: Folder structure
excerpt: Pages in WikiNest map directly to files in the `docs/` directory. The sidebar tree mirrors the directory structure.

title: Internationalization
excerpt: WikiNest supports multiple UI languages. Page content language is not managed — write pages in any language you want.

title: YAML
excerpt: This page demonstrates every markdown feature supported by WikiNest. Use it to verify rendering and as a copy-paste reference when writing d

title: Configuration
excerpt: WikiNest is configured through two places: `config.json` in the repository root, and the settings UI in the browser.

title: Installation
excerpt: WikiNest requires no build step. Fork the repository, enable GitHub Pages, configure your token — done in under 5 minutes.
